decisions.decision: Use hybrid scales: X from per-page UTM grid (~0.3546 m/pt on pages 3–4), Y from viewport height ratio × page-2 overview scale (~0.273 m/pt)
decisions.rationale: Pure isotropic UTM scale on detail pages was worse (~33m avg) than viewport Y; route linework is vertically exaggerated vs 50m grid

decisions.decision: Anchor origin with split X/Y at post 01 GPS; shift between detail pages via viewport box delta on page 2 (rect_pk.x/y), not x1_p2 normalized projection
decisions.rationale: Mixing page-local anchor with x1_p2 offset broke post 01 anchor (~276m errors)

decisions.decision: Do not use cable geometry for distance association (unchanged)
decisions.rationale: Cable is for route/post identification only per user

decisions.decision: Route sequential digits on TEXTO (nested in Numero_Poste in PDF); Poste layer = graphics + postType only
decisions.rationale: User clarification; separate from coordinate work but affects parser accuracy

next_action: Improve posts 02–05/08/10–11 accuracy (cable snap threshold, Poste snap, or browser OCR); fix Node pdf.js canvas rasterization for Tesseract; browser UAT on index.html
